things.name: Philippine Eagle Center
things.description: World's largest eagle - critically endangered Monkey-eating Eagle in a conservation centre

things.name: Mount Apo Summit Trek
things.description: Philippines' highest peak at 2,954m - dormant volcano with pitcher plants

things.name: Samal Island Beach Resort
things.description: Island resort accessible by 5-minute ferry with white-sand beaches

things.name: D'Bone Collector Museum
things.description: Artist-explorer's extraordinary collection of bird and mammal skeletons

things.name: Crocodile Park
things.description: Conservation centre with the largest concentration of Philippine saltwater crocodiles

things.name: Magsaysay Park
things.description: Waterfront park with durian stalls - Davao is the durian capital of the Philippines

things.name: Eden Nature Park
things.description: Mountain eco-park with farm animals, zip-lines and foggy highland gardens

things.name: Bankerohan Market
things.description: Davao's main public market with exotic fruits, orchids and fresh seafood

things.name: Mindanao Cultural Village
things.description: Traditional longhouses and performances of Mindanao's diverse indigenous tribes

things.name: Durian Fruit Tasting
things.description: The King of Fruits - notoriously pungent but extraordinarily delicious
